subtitle: Puzzle Game & Brain Teaser
description:
Chroma Drop is the ultimate block puzzle game! Place colorful blocks on the grid, clear lines, and rack up massive combos. With 500+ levels, daily challenges, and competitive leaderboards, there's always a new challenge waiting.

FEATURES:
• 500+ handcrafted and procedurally generated levels
• Satisfying combo system with up to 5x multipliers
• Daily challenges with streak rewards
• Power-ups: Bombs, Row Clears, and Color Clears
• 4 beautiful themes to customize your experience
• Global leaderboards — compete with players worldwide
• Boss levels every 25 stages
• Earn stars and unlock new content
• Simple to learn, challenging to master

FREE TO PLAY with optional in-app purchases. Remove ads for just $3.99!
keywords: block puzzle, puzzle game, brain teaser, block blast, color blocks, line clear, combo, casual game, puzzle, strategy
